_comment: THE MOAT BOUNDARY REGISTRY — the concrete, machine-checkable version of positioning-seeds.json's prose public_face/private_operation split. For each public repo, `leak_patterns` are literal-VALUE signatures (curated data, not type/interface names) that must NOT appear in the public tree: the calibration and source-map a competitor would steal. scripts/moat-audit.py greps each repo's clone (origin/main) for these and fails closed if any is present. Adding a repo's crown jewels = one entry here. The interfaces/types/architecture stay public (the lure); only the tuned VALUES are guarded. See docs positioning-seeds.json for the prose boundary this enforces.

organvm/public-record-data-scrapper.note: UCC/MCA lead-intelligence platform. Crown jewels: the discovery source-map (which public datasets yield MCA signal) and the curated funder/secured-party dictionaries, then the scoring/underwriting calibration. Interfaces + architecture stay public.
organvm/public-record-data-scrapper._pattern_note: POSIX ERE, single-line (git grep -E is line-oriented; no \b, no \s\S). Each targets a VALUE/data line, not a type/interface, so after the calibration moves to a private module the public tree goes clean while the public interfaces survive. NOTE: server/services/calibration IS the sanctioned public home for the calibration SEAM — public type + ILLUSTRATIVE (fake) defaults + loader; the real values live in gitignored *.private.json. It is git-pathspec-excluded so the structural patterns (minAdbByTier:{, INDUSTRY_RISK_MODIFIERS:...={) don't false-positive on the deliberately-fake illustrative defaults.

leak_patterns.name: sba-ckan-source-id
leak_patterns.why: The SBA 7(a) FOIA CKAN package id — a curated discovery source-map entry (which public dataset yields the 'capital-secured' growth signal).

leak_patterns.name: socrata-dataset-source-map
leak_patterns.why: Socrata building-permit dataset ids (NYC/LA/Orlando/Austin) — the curated 'which portals yield permit growth-signal' source-map.

leak_patterns.name: curated-mca-funder-dictionary
leak_patterns.why: The hand-curated MCA lender/funder name dictionary (KNOWN_FUNDERS / lender list) — competitive market intelligence, not commodity code.

leak_patterns.name: qualification-credit-box-bands
leak_patterns.why: The QualificationService DEFAULT_RULES tier-band VALUES (the object literal, not the Record<> type) — the calibrated credit box. The type stays public; the numeric values must inject from private calibration.

leak_patterns.name: scoring-risk-modifier-tables
leak_patterns.why: ScoringService industry/state risk-modifier table VALUES (the populated literal declaration) — hard-won calibration multipliers.
